findings.summary: Role-specific readiness can be skipped when pod roles use lowercase identifiers such as design or qa-release.
project-bootstrap preflight does not verify repo SoT files, including PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md, despite the runbook saying it does.
Required gate results are listed as passed, but durable command-output evidence with exit status is missing for PR readiness.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Read-only review confirmed baseline ab3bb5483db20137f15caca9eadfde15ca90012e and scoped working-tree changes.
Reviewer reran syntax checks read-only; both exited 0.

checks_reviewed.command: rg -n project-bootstrap and workspace path references across SoT files
checks_reviewed.evidence: Current active SoT references use /workspace/projects/Wondermove-Inc/new-mobile-app; stale /workspace/new-mobile-app references found only in historical evidence/plans.

checks_reviewed.command: pnpm run validate:team-doc; pnpm run validate:repo-operations; pnpm run test:runtime; pnpm run test:local-harness; pnpm turbo run lint test
checks_reviewed.evidence: Reported as passed in .evidence/wm/20260612-project-bootstrap-final-review-prompt.md:63-71, but durable command-output evidence gap is recorded as a Medium finding.

checks_reviewed.command: durable evidence check for required verification gates
checks_reviewed.evidence: REPO_OPERATIONS.md:99-101 requires linked command output with exit status; final prompt provides a pass list but no durable command-output artifact path.
No mobile UI/runtime screen implementation changed; no live OrbStack pod or device claim is made.
No apps/api or packages/contracts paths changed.

residual_risks: No live OrbStack boram-* pod was modified or tested; this review covers source/runtime preparation only.
No live external EAS, Railway, Stitch, Jira, Confluence, GitHub branch protection, store submit, rollout, image, webhook, or production action was performed.
Local validation and local harness evidence do not prove live pod readiness or external platform readiness.
